title: Yes Please
excerpt: Love Amy Poehler so much. If you haven't read Yes Please yet, it is honestly one of my top 10 favorite books ever. So real and so right on. Plus it has pictures and feels very much like a scrapbook!…
body:
Love Amy Poehler so much. If you haven't read Yes Please yet, it is honestly one of my top 10 favorite books ever. So real and so right on. Plus it has pictures and feels very much like a scrapbook! I have the hardcover version, but there is a paperback as well.

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
